description_long: This is a modern, freestanding bathtub with a smooth, oval-shaped basin and gently sloping sides, designed for comfort and style. The exterior and interior surfaces are finished in a clean, glossy white, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. A tall, integrated floor-mounted faucet with a hand shower attachment is positioned at one end, featuring minimalist lines and a metallic finish. The bathtub's rim is thin and even, contributing to its elegant silhouette. A small, circular drainage hole is visible inside the tub, and the overall design is free of any exterior ornamentation or decorative features. The bathtub is likely constructed from acrylic or a composite material, providing both durability and a lightweight structure.
description: A sleek, oval freestanding bathtub with a glossy white finish and a modern floor-mounted faucet. The design is minimalist, with smooth surfaces and no exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full oval shape, smooth white surface, and the faucet with hand shower attachment at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bathtub's elongated profile and the prominent floor-mounted faucet on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the faucet and hand shower attachment centered behind the tub, with the smooth back curve visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tub's rounded end and the faucet assembly on the left.
